# Lamar University SBDC - Beaumont

## Resource type
Local Small Business Development Center office.

## Service area
Hardin, North Jefferson, Jasper, and Newton counties

## Contact information
- Address: 5091 Rolfe Christopher Drive, Beaumont, TX 77705
- Phone: 409-880-2367
- Email: sbdc@lamar.edu
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 8:00 a.m.-5:00 p.m.

## Core services
No-cost confidential business advising for entrepreneurs and small business owners, generally covering business planning, financing, marketing, operations, startup, growth, and related business development needs.

## BOSS routing use
Use for Beaumont/north Jefferson and surrounding counties.

## Best-fit lifecycle stages
Ideation, Validation, Formation, Launch, Operations, Growth, Exit/Transition, Recovery/Troubleshooting depending on the user's need.

## Suggested BOSS next action
Ask for the user's business ZIP/county and primary need, then route to this center only if the service area fits.

## BOSS Library use notes
- Treat this as a resource-routing document, not as legal, tax, lending, certification, or procurement advice.
- Use the linked source URL as the user-facing official link.
- Ask discovery questions before routing when the user is early-stage or unclear.
- For Houston/77084 users, verify county/service-area fit through the official SBDC/SBA locator before giving a final local-office referral.
